CustomField.description:
Since we are hitting the limit of 10 object references, moving the Period calculation to trigger. This field will be set from InvoiceCopyRefInfo trigger.
Here is the logic from existing Period field:
CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c) , 'Rent', leaseworks__Rent__r.leaseworks__Period_Since_Lease_Start__c, 'Assembly MR', leaseworks__Utilization_Report_List_Item__r.leaseworks__Utilization_Report__r.leaseworks__Period__c, 'Aircraft MR', leaseworks__Utilization_Report__r.leaseworks__leaseworks__Period__c, MONTH(leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) + 12 - MONTH(DATEVALUE(leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c)) + 12 * (YEAR(leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) - YEAR(DATEVALUE(leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c)) -1 ) + 1 )
CustomField.label: _Period
